name: Level Conversion Lab
name_jp: レベル<ruby lang="jp"><rb>変</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>換</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>実</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>験</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>室</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Select 1 monster in your hand and show it to your opponent, then roll a six-sided die. If the result is 1, send the selected monster to the Graveyard. If the result is 2-6, the Level of the selected monster becomes equal to the result until the end of this turn.
eff: Select 1 monster in your hand and show it to your opponent, then roll a six-sided die. If the result is 1, send the selected monster to the Graveyard. If the result is 2-6, the Level of the selected monster becomes equal to the result until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
stat_change: Modifies the Levels of monsters in the hand
